title: Anthropic Files For An IPO: Rapid Reaction — With M.G. Siegler
summary: Anthropic has filed to go public. M.G. Siegler discusses the news, Dario Amodei's strategy in taking the company public before OpenAI, the current state of Claude, and whether Anthropic actually needs the capital raised.
